consequences: New sessions should claim the most relevant task rather than treating the post as prose-only or code-only. The .ai handoff note and current spec are the shared context for all three workstreams.
context: This draft is being finalized through both prose refinement and experiment-backed verification. Future sessions need a default work model.
decision: Use a mixed editorial-plus-code coordination pattern for this post: prose work, evidence review, and reproducibility work are all valid continuation paths, and the hub should keep them as separate but related tasks.
title: Default coordination mode is mixed editorial plus code
